meaning: gallons per minute每分钟加仑数,加仑[分]
examples: Use the blue 4 GPM heavy volume size.
In engineering, GPM is gallons per minute, a design criterion.
In Management GPM is an acronym for Goals, Plans, and Metrics.
Some newer engines also have flow-rate monitors for the discharges, these show the rate of water flowing in Gallons per Minute (GPM) instead of raw pressure.
